scripts.build: npm run build:user && npm run build:dev
scripts.check: npm run check:astro && npm run check:eslint && npm run check:prettier
scripts.check:astro:user: npm --workspace user-docs exec -- astro sync && npm --workspace user-docs exec -- astro check
scripts.check:astro:dev: npm --workspace dev-docs exec -- astro sync && npm --workspace dev-docs exec -- astro check
scripts.check:astro: npm run check:astro:user && npm run check:astro:dev
